arguments.code:
pass
products = []
prices = []
count = 0
while True:
 try:
 product_info = products.pop()
 price = round(float(product_info['price']), 2)
 count += 1
 prices.append(price)
 except IndexError:
 break
avg_price = sum(prices)/count if count > 0 else 0
avg_price
